'''wojangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atactostelic|atactostelic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atactostelic|atactostelic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wojangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojangithi|wojangithi]] || [[word:wojangiji|wojangiji]] || [[word:wojangishi|wojangishi]] || [[word:wojangiki|wojangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojanguthuthu|wojanguthuthu]] || [[word:wojangujuju|wojangujuju]] || [[word:wojangushushu|wojangushushu]] || [[word:wojangukuku|wojangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojanguthu|wojanguthu]] || [[word:wojanguju|wojanguju]] || [[word:wojangushu|wojangushu]] || [[word:wojanguku|wojanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojangufthuf|wojangufthuf]] || [[word:wojangufjuf|wojangufjuf]] || [[word:wojangufshuf|wojangufshuf]] || [[word:wojangufkuf|wojangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojangethe|wojangethe]] || [[word:wojangeje|wojangeje]] || [[word:wojangeshe|wojangeshe]] || [[word:wojangeke|wojangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojangothotho|wojangothotho]] || [[word:wojangojojo|wojangojojo]] || [[word:wojangoshosho|wojangoshosho]] || [[word:wojangokoko|wojangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojangotho|wojangotho]] || [[word:wojangojo|wojangojo]] || [[word:wojangosho|wojangosho]] || [[word:wojangoko|wojangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojangofthof|wojangofthof]] || [[word:wojangofjof|wojangofjof]] || [[word:wojangofshof|wojangofshof]] || [[word:wojangofkof|wojangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojangïfthïf|wojangïfthïf]] || [[word:wojangïfjïf|wojangïfjïf]] || [[word:wojangïfshïf|wojangïfshïf]] || [[word:wojangïfkïf|wojangïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojangïfthïfthïf|wojangïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wojangïfjïfjïf|wojangïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wojangïfshïfshïf|wojangïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wojangïfkïfkïf|wojangïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojangïfthïf|wojangïfthïf]] || [[word:wojangïfjïf|wojangïfjïf]] || [[word:wojangïfshïf|wojangïfshïf]] || [[word:wojangïfkïf|wojangïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojangïfthïf|wojangïfthïf]] || [[word:wojangïfjïf|wojangïfjïf]] || [[word:wojangïfshïf|wojangïfshïf]] || [[word:wojangïfkïf|wojangïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojangæthæ|wojangæthæ]] || [[word:wojangæjæ|wojangæjæ]] || [[word:wojangæshæ|wojangæshæ]] || [[word:wojangækæ|wojangækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojangathatha|wojangathatha]] || [[word:wojangajaja|wojangajaja]] || [[word:wojangashasha|wojangashasha]] || [[word:wojangakaka|wojangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojangatha|wojangatha]] || [[word:wojangaja|wojangaja]] || [[word:wojangasha|wojangasha]] || [[word:wojangaka|wojangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojangafthaf|wojangafthaf]] || [[word:wojangafjaf|wojangafjaf]] || [[word:wojangafshaf|wojangafshaf]] || [[word:wojangafkaf|wojangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wojangasha|wojangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojangshësha|wojangshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojangrosha|wojangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojangmusha|wojangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojangyasha|wojangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojangnkshësha|gowojangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojangnkrosha|gowojangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojangnkmusha|gowojangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojangnkyasha|gowojangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wojajangasha|wojajangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojajangshësha|wojajangshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojajangrosha|wojajangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojajangmusha|wojajangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojajangyasha|wojajangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojajangnkshësha|gowojajangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojajangnkrosha|gowojajangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojajangnkmusha|gowojajangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojajangnkyasha|gowojajangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wejængasha|wejængasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wejængshësha|wejængshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wejængrosha|wejængrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wejængmusha|wejængmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wejængyasha|wejængyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowejængnkshësha|gowejængnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowejængnkrosha|gowejængnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowejængnkmusha|gowejængnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowejængnkyasha|gowejængnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wojfangasha|wojfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojfangshësha|wojfangshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojfangrosha|wojfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojfangmusha|wojfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojfangyasha|wojfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojfangnkshësha|gowojfangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojfangnkrosha|gowojfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojfangnkmusha|gowojfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojfangnkyasha|gowojfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
